channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: TikTok Notes is shutting down as Lemon8 steps in
item.description: TikTok is shutting down TikTok Notes—wait, you didn’t even know it existed? Well, that explains a lot. TikTok Notes, the platform’s short-lived attempt to take on Instagram (just as Instagram Reels was built to mimic TikTok), is officially being retired.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: ServiceNow to acquire Logik.ai to boost CRM portfolio
item.description: ServiceNow is acquiring Logik.ai and its configure, price, quote (CPQ) solution to expand its customer relationship management (CRM) product portfolio and accelerate its momentum in sales and order management. Logik.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Visa unveils a trio of new tools to make the payments process easier
item.description: At Visa’s ETA Transact event on April 3, the payments giant introduced three new products designed to simplify and secure payment acceptance. These innovations—Authorize.
item.dc:creator: Lily McDonald, Fast Company

item.title: GitHub upgrades tooling to help developers stop leaking secrets
item.description: Over 39 million API keys, credentials, and other secrets leaked onto GitHub’s platform last year, but an update to its scanning tool could help stop that.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Amazon adds new benefit to Prime subscription that gives members a better chance of buying an Nvidia RTX 5000 or AMD RX 9070 GPU
item.description: Desperate to buy a reasonably priced Nvidia Blackwell or AMD RDNA 4 GPU? You’ll get better odds if you’re a Prime member.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Adobe Premiere Pro updates bring some serious AI power
item.description: Adobe is leveraging AI in version 25.2 of Premiere Pro for Generative Extend, auto caption translation and more.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: La restauración del patrimonio cultural se rinde a la innovación tecnológica
item.description: La compañía gallega Sixtema lleva a término el proyecto RESTAUR.AR, una iniciativa de I+D orientada a desarrollar nuevas herramientas digitales para la conservación, restauración y divulgación del patrimonio cultural.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Digi Yatra aims to be the ‘Travel stack of India’: CEO, Suresh Khadakbhavi
item.description: Digi Yatra, a mobile-based platform that uses facial recognition technology to make air travel more seamless and secure, was developed by the Ministry of Civil Aviation (MOCA) and the Digi Yatra Foundation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What is AI thinking? Anthropic researchers are starting to figure it out
item.description: Why are AI chatbots so intelligent—capable of understanding complex ideas, crafting surprisingly good short stories, and intuitively grasping what users mean? The truth is, we don’t fully know. Large language models “think” in ways that don’t look very human.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Why no one is challenging Trump's executive order that keeps TikTok running
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After TikTok was banned in the United States earlier this year, President Donald Trump gave the platform a reprieve, barreling past a law that was passed in Congress and upheld unanimously by the Supreme Court that said the ban was necessary for national security.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Senators revive efforts to strip tech companies of key legal protection
item.description: Senators from both sides of the aisle are reigniting efforts to crawl back technology companies' legal immunities with hopes bipartisan support in Congress could push the bill across the finish line this session and gain the backing of President Trump. Sens. Dick Durbin (D-Ill.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AI agents can (and will) be scammed
item.description: Generative AI’s newest superstars — independent-acting agents — are on a tear. Organizations are adopting the technology at a staggering rate because they can use APIs or be embedded with standard apps and automate all kinds of business processes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Agentic AI won’t make public cloud providers rich
item.description: While major cloud providers, such as AWS, Google, and Microsoft are rushing to position themselves as leaders in AI development and deployment, the reality of agentic AI’s impact on public cloud growth may not align with their ambitious projections—at least, in my opinion. I’ll tell you why.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Volcano erupts in southwestern Iceland after a nearby town and spa are evacuated
item.description: A volcano in southwestern Iceland that has erupted repeatedly for more than a year again belched lava and smoke into the air, just hours after authorities evacuated the few remaining residents of a nearby fishing village.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity
item.description: By integrating zero trust into a less complex network infrastructure, the military can access data to speed decisions, Army G-6 deputy chief of staff says. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How AI is transforming IDEs into intelligent development assistants
item.description: Ever feel like you’re spending more time squashing bugs than actually building something? You’re not alone—developers spend a whopping 35% of their time debugging and reviewing code instead of writing it. That’s like ordering pizza and only eating the crust.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 23andMe customer DNA ‘up for grabs’ amid bankruptcy: Attorney
item.description: With a saliva sample, DNA-testing companies like 23andMe provide a profile of a person’s genetic heritage.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: AI enables paralyzed man to control robotic arm with brain signals
item.description: The combination of artificial intelligence and neuroscience allows a paralyzed man to manipulate a robotic arm by using his brain to imagine movements.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GenAI, the future of fraud and why you may be an easy target
item.description: With the help of artificial intelligence, sophisticated fraud techniques emerging today are virtually undetectable to the untrained eye.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man accused of coercing 9-year-old into sharing explicit images after chatting on TikTok and Roblox
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A U.S. airman has been charged with coercing a 9-year-old girl to share sexually explicit images of herself after he posed as a 13-year-old and chatted with the child on TikTok and the gaming site Roblox.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
